description: Per-claim origin correctness, live (decision 0046): a question spanning the user's world and the wider world blends both origins — the stored fact is cited ({{cite}} present), the general-knowledge half is marked {{unsourced}}, and the knowledge classification carries the research offer.
notes: Adriatic Foods uses HubSpot as their CRM; the Atlas project migrates their data into it.
Ana Kovač at Adriatic Foods is the main contact for the Atlas CRM Migration.
script: What is HubSpot generally known for, and which CRM does Adriatic Foods use today?

coverage_facts: Adriatic Foods uses HubSpot as their CRM
HubSpot is known as a CRM / inbound marketing platform
